'''Thorp''' was a pale-skinned [[Sakiyan/Legends|Sakiyan]]. Residing on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]], [[Ackmena/Legends|Ackmena]] had done him an important favor in the past. Because of this, he was often a guest of hers at the [[Chalmun's Spaceport Cantina/Legends|Mos Eisley cantina]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The Star Wars Holiday Special]]'' {{1st}}

===Non-canon appearances===
